zh.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe於1470年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾達頓。他於1498年與Lady Isabel Saville在英國英格蘭越可爾德斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於從1540年到1542年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe于1470年出生在英国英格兰越可爾達頓。他于1498年与Lady Isabel Saville在英国英格兰越可爾德斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于从1540年到1542年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Marshe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: March
meanings: English: habitational name from March (Cambridgeshire) or from any of numerous minor English placenames deriving from Middle English marche ‘boundary’ (partly from Old English mearc in the dative-case form mearce, partly from Old French marche). Compare Mark 2.
Catalan: from the personal name March, Catalan equivalent of Mark 1. This surname is also found in southern France.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German march, Middle High German marc(h) ‘mark, sign, boundary’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word (Bavaria).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe was born in 1470, in Darton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Lady Isabel Saville in 1498, in Huddersfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died from 1540 to 1542, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe est né en 1470, à Darton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Lady Isabel Saville en 1498, à Huddersfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé du 1540 au 1542, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe wurde 1470 in Darton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1498 in Huddersfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Isabel Saville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb von 1540 bis 1542 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe è nato il nel 1470 nel Darton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Lady Isabel Saville nel 1498, nel Huddersfield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì da 1540 a 1542, nel sua cittadina.

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe(은)는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 더르턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 허더스필드에서 Lady Isabel Saville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1540년 부터 1542년 까지 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Marshe родился в 1470 г. в местности дартон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel Saville в 1498 г. в местности худдирсфиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер с 1540 по 1542 в его родном городе.
